content.description:
Ultra-compact pill-shaped card for use in lists. Shows only the item name with ellipsis truncation. Click opens item as sibling window.

Designed as the default child view for sortable-list-view, where vertical density matters more than preview content.
content.hob:
(let [it (get-item (:id item))
      name (or (:name it) (subs (:id it) 0 8))]
  [:div.inline-card {:style "display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; background: var(--color-bg-surface); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light); border-radius: var(--border-radius); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s;"
                     :title name
                     :on-click (fn [e] (open-item! (:id it)))}
    [:span {:style "overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: var(--color-text);"}
      name]])
